name: Better Me Book (Leaving Steam)
short_description: Better Me Book is an online personal book, journal, wellness and self betterment platform for those looking to better themselves and achieve their goals. You can post secure and private daily journals or post your progress in your profile book.
detailed_description:
Better Me Book will officially be leaving Steam and will no longer be supported. We have our new project on Steam that is replacing this one. We will be having a final sale for those who would still like to have this app or support our current endeavors. Thank you everyone who showed support for this project, we are forever grateful.

For everyone who purchases or purchased this application, I will be providing you lifetime access to our new platform. Follow the instructions below and I will private message you instructions.

1. You need to have purchased this application and it must rest in your inventory.

2. Post here in the news thread "Better Me".
